title: The riskiest SpaceX stock trade of all had a big first week
title_zh: 风险最高的 SpaceX 股票交易首周表现强劲
text: SpaceX's IPO did not just mint the biggest debut in market history and a trillionaire, but it also triggered a historic land grab in risky leveraged ETFs.
zh: SpaceX 的 IPO 不仅创造了市场历史上最大的首次公开募股和万亿富翁，而且还引发了风险杠杆 ETF 的历史性抢滩。

title: NetJets' first fatal crash kills influential Texas VC founder
title_zh: NetJets 的第一次致命事故导致颇具影响力的德克萨斯州风险投资创始人丧生
text: NetJets is not speculating on what caused one of its planes to crash onto a highway in Laredo, Texas late Tuesday, killing a prominent tech entrepreneur.
zh: NetJets 并未推测其一架飞机周二晚间坠毁在德克萨斯州拉雷多的高速公路上，导致一名著名科技企业家丧生的原因。

title: Homeowners tapped $47 billion in equity in the first quarter. What to consider before you borrow
title_zh: 第一季度房主动用了 470 亿美元的股本。借钱之前要考虑什么
text: While high home values mean homeowners are sitting on an estimated $11 trillion in equity, it should not be viewed as free money, experts say.
zh: 专家表示，虽然高房价意味着房主坐拥约 11 万亿美元的股本，但不应将其视为免费资金。

title: ‘We own our home outright’: I am 67 and earn $100,000. Do I take my $30,000-a-year Social Security now or wait?
title_zh: “我们完全拥有自己的房子”：我今年 67 岁，收入 10 万美元。我现在领取每年 30,000 美元的社会保障还是等待？
text: “We have combined savings of $950,000 in retirement plans, Roth IRAs and Treasuries.”
zh: “我们在退休计划、Roth IRA 和国债中总共节省了 950,000 美元。”

title_zh: 科技股抛售和对中国经济的担忧导致全球市场陷入困境 - 英国《卫报》
text: Global markets struggle after tech sell-off and fears over Chinese economy The Guardian
zh: 科技股抛售和对中国经济的担忧导致全球市场陷入困境

title: Pixar's 'Toy Story 5' lassos biggest opening weekend in franchise history with $160 million haul
title_zh: 皮克斯的《玩具总动员 5》创下系列历史上最大的首周末票房收入 1.6 亿美元
text: Disney and Pixar's "Toy Story 5" tallied $160 million domestically during its opening weekend, the highest debut in franchise history.
zh: 迪士尼和皮克斯出品的《玩具总动员 5》在首映周末国内票房收入达到 1.6 亿美元，创下该系列历史上首映票房最高纪录。

title: Musk's SpaceX stake is worth over $1 trillion. Here are the other billionaire shareholders
title_zh: 马斯克持有的 SpaceX 股份价值超过 1 万亿美元。以下是其他亿万富翁股东
text: SpaceX shares were up 37% after its historic debut last week, which offered shares at a set price of $135.
zh: SpaceX 上周以 135 美元的定价发行股票，历史性地首次亮相，股价上涨 37%。

title: Memory crisis hits such extremes that 'even Apple can't be safe'
title_zh: 内存危机达到如此极端“连苹果也不能安全”
text: Apple appears poised to take the rare step of increasing prices to deal with what CEO Tim Cook called an "unsustainable" memory shortage.
zh: 苹果似乎准备采取罕见的涨价举措，以应对首席执行官蒂姆·库克所说的“不可持续”的内存短缺问题。

title: Struggling to find a job? Try looking in Nevada
title_zh: 正在努力寻找工作吗？尝试在内华达州寻找
text: The sparsely populated state known for its world-class casinos and dry climate has been a hiring hot spot.
zh: 这个人口稀少的州以其世界一流的赌场和干燥的气候而闻名，一直是招聘热点。

title: Bob Iger reflects on 10 years of Shanghai Disneyland as it defies the Chinese pullback
title_zh: 鲍勃·艾格回顾上海迪士尼乐园十年来不顾中国撤资的消息
text: Shanghai Disneyland hit 100 million cumulative visitors in 2025, according to the company. It's a relatively new but important foothold in Disney's history.
zh: 据该公司称，到2025年，上海迪士尼乐园累计游客量将突破1亿人次。这是迪士尼历史上相对较新但重要的立足点。

title: Russia threatens escalation after Ukraine hits Moscow with largest-ever drone attack
title_zh: 乌克兰对莫斯科发动有史以来最大规模的无人机袭击后，俄罗斯威胁升级
text: Russia has pledged to carry out frequent and "massive group strikes" against Ukraine shortly after Kyiv launched a barrage of drones on Moscow.
zh: 在基辅向莫斯科发射无人机后不久，俄罗斯承诺对乌克兰进行频繁的“大规模集体打击”。

title: Berkshire shares trade lower even after Abel scores good marks at meeting, earnings jump
title_zh: 即使阿贝尔在会议上取得好成绩、盈利大幅增长，伯克希尔股价仍走低
text: Many in the investment community were reassured by Abel's firm grasp over Berkshire's sprawling enterprise.
zh: 阿贝尔对伯克希尔庞大企业的坚定控制让投资界的许多人感到放心。

title: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
title_zh: Citadel 的 Ken Griffin 表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，全球经济衰退将不可避免
text: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，未来 6 到 12 个月霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁将意味着不可避免的经济衰退。

title: Treasury Secretary Bessent backs rate cuts but says he understands if the Fed wants to wait
title_zh: 财政部长贝森特支持降息，但表示他理解美联储是否愿意等待
text: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.
zh: 贝森特此前曾表示，美联储应加快降息，称降息是经济增长强劲的“唯一缺失的因素”。

title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场
text: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.
zh: 即使伯克希尔哈撒韦公司去年底减持了其股份，苹果公司仍然是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司最大的持股公司。

title: If you're surprised by how well the stock market is doing, so is Jamie Dimon - Fortune
title_zh: 如果你对股市的表现感到惊讶，那么杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 也会如此 - 《财富》
text: If you're surprised by how well the stock market is doing, so is Jamie Dimon Fortune
zh: 如果您对股市的表现感到惊讶，那么杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 也会感到惊讶 - 财富中文网

title_zh: 2025 年美国投资者最青睐的新兴市场经济体 - Nomad Capitalist
text: Top Emerging Market Economies for US Investors in 2025 Nomad Capitalist
zh: 2025 年美国投资者最青睐的新兴市场经济体 Nomad Capitalist

title: No one wants AI data centers on Earth. Do they make sense in space?
title_zh: 没有人希望人工智能数据中心位于地球上。它们在太空中有意义吗？
text: Elon Musk's SpaceX is betting big on orbital AI data centers. The public doesn't want them on Earth, but the economic case for space-based is questionable.
zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 在轨道人工智能数据中心上下了重注。公众不希望它们出现在地球上，但太空基地的经济理由值得怀疑。

title: Raising the minimum wage has been a big political winner. Now it's running into resistance
title_zh: 提高最低工资是一个巨大的政治赢家。现在遇到了阻力
text: Raising the minimum wage has been a progressive policy winner at the ballot box, but recent losses suggest an economic mood slowing its political momentum.
zh: 提高最低工资一直是投票箱中进步政策的赢家，但最近的失败表明经济情绪放缓了其政治势头。

title: Republicans buy crypto more than Democrats, data shows — what's driving the divide
title_zh: 数据显示，共和党人比民主党人购买加密货币更多——是什么造成了这种分歧
text: "There's a massive, massive partisan gap," of crypto adoption between Democrats and Republicans. Here's why.
zh: 民主党和共和党之间在加密货币的采用方面存在“巨大的党派分歧”。原因如下。

title: The best parents and leaders use a 3-step formula to help people handle uncertainty, says Dr. Becky Kennedy
title_zh: 贝基·肯尼迪博士表示，最好的父母和领导者会使用三步公式来帮助人们应对不确定性
text: Even if you can't control an outcome, you can still help your child or co-worker feel more at ease with uncertainty, just by how you describe a situation.
zh: 即使您无法控制结果，您仍然可以通过如何描述情况来帮助您的孩子或同事在不确定性中感到更加自在。

title: She saved $24,000 to launch a craft festival in an old Joann store: 'This is my dream come true'
title_zh: 她节省了 24,000 美元，在乔安的一家老商店举办了一场手工艺节：“这是我的梦想成真”
text: "This is my dream come true," says Tetef, a long-time events producer. "I just want to go to a thing where everyone's sitting down making stuff."
zh: “这是我的梦想成真，”长期担任活动制作人的特特夫说。 “我只是想去一个每个人都坐下来制作东西的地方。”

title: The No. 1 trick I always teach to build unshakeable confidence—it worked for Beyoncé and Adele
title_zh: 我一直教的建立不可动摇自信的第一招——它对碧昂斯和阿黛尔有效
text: "No matter how talented or prepared you are, self-doubt can get in your way," says therapist Amy Morin. Here's how to channel your alter ego so you can do your best.
zh: “无论你多么有才华或准备如何，自我怀疑都会阻碍你，”治疗师艾米·莫林说。以下是如何引导你的另一个自我，以便你可以做到最好。

title: Here are 3 big things to watch in the stock market this coming week
title_zh: 本周股市有3件值得关注的大事
text: FedEx reports earnings, and the Fed's preferred inflation gauge is due out.
zh: 联邦快递公布财报，美联储首选的通胀指标即将公布。

title: In photos: Star-studded crowd gathers to celebrate the Obama Presidential Center dedication
title_zh: 照片中：众星云集，庆祝奥巴马总统中心落成
text: Barack Obama opened his presidential center in Chicago with former presidents, celebrities and dignitaries in attendance. President Donald Trump was absent.
zh: 巴拉克·奥巴马 (Barack Obama) 在芝加哥开设了他的总统中心，前总统、名人和政要出席了仪式。唐纳德·特朗普总统缺席。

title: India's largest telecom and digital service Jio Platforms files for IPO
title_zh: 印度最大的电信和数字服务 Jio Platforms 申请 IPO
text: India's largest wireless operator and digital service provider, Jio Platforms files for IPO
zh: 印度最大的无线运营商和数字服务提供商 Jio Platforms 申请 IPO

title: Jio Platforms eyes low-orbit satellite rollout as Starlink awaits India launch
title_zh: 星链等待印度发射，Jio Platforms 着眼于推出低轨道卫星
text: Jio Platforms, India's largest telecom operator and digital services company, wants to rollout statelite communication in the country where Starlink still awaits launch.
zh: 印度最大的电信运营商和数字服务公司 Jio Platforms 希望在 Starlink 仍在等待推出的国家推出国家通信服务。

title: Why Japan's $70 billion-plus intervention and a rate hike didn't prop up the yen more
title_zh: 为什么日本超过 700 亿美元的干预和加息没有进一步支撑日元
text: Japan was willing to step in to defend the yen around the 160 level before, and it's at that point again.
zh: 日本之前曾愿意出手捍卫日元160附近的水平，现在又是这个时候了。

title: U.S. opens tariff probe targeting Germany’s drug pricing policies
title_zh: 美国对德国药品定价政策展开关税调查
text: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said Germany's proposal to reduce spending on medicines was "a serious step backwards."
zh: 美国贸易代表杰米森·格里尔表示，德国减少药品支出的提议是“严重的倒退”。

title: Micron’s earnings are a must-watch market event — with profit growth approaching 1,000%
title_zh: 美光财报是必看的市场事件——利润增长接近 1,000%
text: Micron’s massive growth is “coming at nearly pure profit,” and that’s starting to have real implications for the S&P 500.
zh: 美光科技的大幅增长“几乎是纯利润”，这开始对标准普尔 500 指数产生真正的影响。

title: This bull market isn’t going to end because of Fed rate hikes under Warsh
title_zh: 这次牛市不会因为沃什领导下的美联储加息而结束
text: Warsh may hope the threat of rate hikes is enough. But stocks might gain ground if he does, and past rate-hike cycles can be a guide.
zh: 沃什可能希望加息的威胁就足够了。但如果他这样做，股市可能会上涨，过去的加息周期可以作为参考。

title: From the US to China, 2025 a blockbuster year for stock markets - Al Jazeera
title_zh: 从美国到中国，2025 年是股市重磅之年 - 半岛电视台
text: From the US to China, 2025 a blockbuster year for stock markets Al Jazeera
zh: 从美国到中国，2025 年是股市重磅之年

title: 'Regime change but in a velvet glove': How Kevin Warsh has set out to remake the Fed
title_zh: “政权更迭，但戴着丝绒手套”：凯文·沃什如何着手重塑美联储
text: The first big announced changes point toward a quiet revolution, with task forces set up to rethink virtually everything done at the Fed.
zh: 第一个宣布的重大变化预示着一场悄然的革命，成立了特别工作组来重新思考美联储所做的几乎所有事情。

title: Top Wall Street analysts like these 3 dividend stocks for solid returns
title_zh: 华尔街顶级分析师喜欢这三只股息股票，以获得稳定的回报
text: TipRanks discusses three dividend-paying stocks.
zh: TipRanks 讨论了三种派息股票。

title: The secret to wellness is simple: Eat this breakfast and work out at the right time
title_zh: 健康的秘诀很简单：吃早餐并在正确的时间锻炼
text: The key to a healthy breakfast is less about when you eat it and more about what you eat.
zh: 健康早餐的关键不在于何时吃，而在于吃什么。

title: Iran reportedly closes Strait of Hormuz again, casting shadow over nuclear talks
title_zh: 据报道伊朗再次关闭霍尔木兹海峡，为核谈判蒙上阴影
text: Iran's joint military command said the closure was in response to continued Israeli military operations in Lebanon.
zh: 伊朗联合军事指挥部表示，封锁是为了回应以色列在黎巴嫩持续的军事行动。

title: 'Fun dads' get 5 things right about parenting that many people forget—'they're worth borrowing' this Father's Day, says expert
title_zh: 专家表示，“有趣的爸爸”在育儿方面做了五件事，但很多人都忘记了——今年父亲节“值得借用”
text: Many parents spend their days managing schedules, chores and responsibilities. This Father's Day, a parenting expert shares five "fun dad" habits that can increase joy and strengthen parent-child relationships.
zh: 许多父母每天都在管理日程、家务和责任。今年父亲节，育儿专家分享了五个“有趣的爸爸”习惯，可以增加快乐并加强亲子关系。

title: Scared to spend your retirement money? Here’s one way to get over the fear of running out.
title_zh: 害怕花掉你的退休金吗？这是克服耗尽恐惧的一种方法。
text: This fear is probably going to cause you some regrets.
zh: 这种恐惧可能会让你后悔。

title: You’re going to pay tax on RMDs — there’s no way around it. Or is there?
title_zh: 你需要为 RMD 缴税——这是没有办法避免的。或者有吗？
text: Here’s your new playbook to protect your retirement cash.
zh: 这是保护您退休现金的新策略。

title: Social Security is looking at a $500-a-month cut. Could a new bipartisan commission make a difference?
title_zh: 社会保障计划每月削减 500 美元。新的两党委员会能带来改变吗？
text: A new legislative proposal would create a bipartisan commission to strengthen the finances of Social Security and Medicare at a time when the programs are under pressure.
zh: 一项新的立法提案将成立一个两党委员会，以在社会保障和医疗保险项目面临压力之际加强其财政。

title: Inside the push to weaken Washington’s toughest financial watchdog
title_zh: 削弱华盛顿最严厉金融监管机构的努力
text: The SEC used to intimidate corporate wrongdoers. Now its own commissioners are gutting its leverage.
zh: 美国证券交易委员会过去常常恐吓企业违法者。现在它自己的委员们正在削弱它的影响力。

title: We read the Social Security and Medicare trustees reports. If you’re not worried, you should be.
title_zh: 我们阅读了社会保障和医疗保险受托人报告。如果你不担心，你应该担心。
text: The truth about “DOGE” savings, no tax on Social Security, immigration — and more.
zh: 关于“DOGE”储蓄、社会保障免税、移民等等的真相。

title: Want to splurge on travel in retirement? Here’s how to plan for it.
title_zh: 想在退休后挥霍旅行吗？以下是如何制定计划。
text: A lot of people wait until retirement to take big trips. Plan ahead, and don’t wait too long.
zh: 许多人等到退休后才进行长途旅行。提前计划，不要等待太久。

title: I’m 73 and living 100% off dividends from my stocks. How can I create even more income?
title_zh: 我今年 73 岁，靠股票股息 100% 过活。我怎样才能创造更多的收入？
text: A “bulletproof” portfolio may be impossible, but you can try to get close if you have enough money invested
zh: “防弹”投资组合可能是不可能的，但如果您投资了足够的资金，您可以尝试接近这一目标

title: The one-page pledge that forces your financial adviser to put you first
title_zh: 一页纸的承诺迫使您的财务顾问将您放在第一位
text: Most investors ignore this abstract legal rule — and it’s fueling a massive wave of fraud.
zh: 大多数投资者忽视了这一抽象的法律规则——这助长了大规模的欺诈浪潮。

title_zh: 尽管出口繁荣，中国经济仍难以恢复国内动力：报告 - 印度时报
text: China's economy struggles to regain domestic momentum despite export boom: Report The Times of India
zh: 印度时报报道，尽管出口繁荣，中国经济仍难以恢复国内动力

title: Commentary: Beijing cracks down on cross-border investment but it is up to something grander - CNA
title_zh: 评论：北京打击跨境投资，但它有更大的目的-CNA
text: Commentary: Beijing cracks down on cross-border investment but it is up to something grander CNA
zh: 评论：北京打击跨境投资，但有更大的目的 CNA

title: AI buildout gives tech investors new reasons to watch bond market
title_zh: 人工智能的发展为科技投资者提供了关注债券市场的新理由
text: Tech giants are depleting cash reserves and raising debt in their ambitious data center buildouts, a dynamic that's forcing investors to watch interest rates.
zh: 科技巨头正在耗尽现金储备，并在其雄心勃勃的数据中心建设中举债，这种动态迫使投资者关注利率。

title: The budget airline model in the U.S. is running out of runway
title_zh: 美国的廉价航空公司模式即将耗尽跑道
text: Spirit's bankruptcy as United and Delta fly high suggests there's more to success in airline industry than low fares, and failure isn't about jet fuel spikes.
zh: 随着联合航空和达美航空的飞速发展，精神航空破产，这表明航空业的成功不仅仅在于低票价，而失败与航空燃油飙升无关。

title: Bitcoin's future as revolutionary as the smartphone, according to CoinDesk
title_zh: CoinDesk 表示，比特币的未来将像智能手机一样具有革命性
text: CoinDesk’s president of indices and data has a message for investors: Don’t count out bitcoin.
zh: CoinDesk 的指数和数据总裁向投资者传达了一条信息：不要指望比特币。

title: SNAP restrictions could change what shoppers buy — and food giants are watching
title_zh: SNAP 限制可能会改变购物者的购买方式——食品巨头正在关注
text: SNAP food restrictions are spreading to more states, pressuring major food and beverage as consumers shift spending away from soda, candy and processed foods.
zh: SNAP 食品限制正在蔓延到更多州，随着消费者将支出从苏打水、糖果和加工食品上转移，主要食品和饮料面临压力。

title: I’m 55 and retiring in 6 years. Should I be switching to Roth 401(k) contributions now?
title_zh: 我今年 55 岁，6 年后退休。我现在应该转向 Roth 401(k) 捐款吗？
text: People are still holding back on participating in Roth plans at work, Vanguard says.
zh: 先锋集团表示，人们仍然不愿在工作中参与罗斯计划。

title: SpaceX’s massive valuation may soon become its own worst enemy
title_zh: SpaceX 的巨额估值可能很快就会成为其最大的敌人
text: The biggest companies struggle to keep up with the stock market due to size alone.
zh: 仅凭规模，最大的公司就难以跟上股市的步伐。

title: ‘Money can make you happy’: My wife and I have no heirs, but we’re making the world a better place by giving it away
title_zh: “金钱可以让你快乐”：我和妻子没有继承人，但我们通过捐赠金钱让世界变得更美好
text: “If you find a need in your community, there’s likely an organization that will help you get involved.”
zh: “如果您发现社区有需求，很可能会有一个组织帮助您参与其中。”

title: Americans’ 401(k) balances hit record levels last year. See how you compare.
title_zh: 去年美国人的 401(k) 余额创下历史新高。看你比较如何。
text: It was a very good year for most workplace retirement savers, according to Vanguard’s latest “How America Saves” report
zh: 根据先锋集团最新的“美国如何储蓄”报告，对于大多数工作场所退休储蓄者来说，这是非常好的一年

title: Tesla booted from the ‘Magnificent Seven’ by a top fund manager. Here is the tech giant he’s crowned.
title_zh: 特斯拉被一位顶级基金经理从“七巨头”中剔除。这是他加冕的科技巨头。
text: T. Rowe Price fund manager David Giroux says Big Tech isn’t in a bubble, but there’s value in healthcare and utilities.
zh: T. Rowe Price 基金经理 David Giroux 表示，大型科技公司并未陷入泡沫，但医疗保健和公用事业领域具有价值。

title: Three powerful forces are draining family wealth — and your estate plan is completely unprepared
title_zh: 三大强大力量正在耗尽家族财富——而您的遗产计划却完全措手不及
text: From Medicaid cuts to an IRA tax trap, here are the real threats to your family’s inheritance and what to do about them.
zh: 从医疗补助削减到爱尔兰共和军税收陷阱，以下是对您家庭遗产的真正威胁以及应对措施。
